docket_entries.description: WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT GANNON, COURTNEY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-22-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GROOM, ALYSSA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GANNON, COURTNEY $9,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,125.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,000.00 FILED BY GROOM, ALYSSA AS TO DEFENDANT GANNON, COURTNEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-22-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF GROOM, ALYSSA AS TO DEFENDANT GANNON, COURTNEY
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO RYAN WARD - 926 POWELL STREET #34 S.F. 94108
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 SERVED DEC-05-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GANNON, COURTNEY
SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 50.00 -

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-22-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-22-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $3,440.00 ACCRUED INTEREST, $100.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO PLAINTIFF GROOM, ALYSSA
